name: CINTAS CORP
business: Cintas provides a wide range of products and services including uniforms, mats, mops, shop towels, restroom supplies, workplace water services, first aid and safety products, eye-wash stations, safety training, fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems and alarm testing to over one million businesses in the U.S., Canada, and Latin America.

exposures.sentence: Cyber-security attacks are evolving, and cybercriminals have increasingly demonstrated advanced capabilities, such as zero-day vulnerabilities and rapid integration of new technology such as generative artificial intelligence.
Emerging artificial intelligence technologies may intensify these cybersecurity risks.
